name: Rajender Kumar Chaudhary
rationale: Belief in Congress ideology; born in Congress family; pain for every backward class; true soldier of the party
strengths: Belongs to family with Congress history since 1937; college-days NSUI; good hold in area and administration
proposers: Ram Singh Saini (Ex Home Minister, 5x MLA); Furkan Ahmed (MLA); Dr. Rakam Singh (Ex State Minister)
positions_held: NSUI Vice President (1990-1993); Secretary IYC (1993-1994); Vice President Roorkee (2004-2005); District President (current)

name: Sudhir Shandilya
rationale: Country troubled due to wrong policies of BJP; only Congress can provide relief and strengthen every section
strengths: Best District President Award by NSUI 2005; Vice President Kisan Congress 2020; working in field for Congress
positions_held: City President NSUI (1996-1998); NSUI District President (1998-2007)

name: Ravinder Khanna
rationale: Want to add more people and groups in party and to rise party
strengths: 5 times Independent councilor from different wards; good worker of party

name: Ritu Kandiyal
rationale: Working in Congress party from last 25 years; wants to add more ladies in party
strengths: Good hold in ladies and in youth; District President of INTUC
positions_held: Vice President Mahila Congress (2003-2006); State GS (2011-2013)

name: Aadesh Kumar Saini
rationale: Family is Congress family from last 50 years; always participates in every Congress programme
strengths: Doing job in college, so mostly youth is connected with him

name: Melaram
rationale: Connected with farmer and village people, wants to make strong the party
strengths: Good hold in different communities; very simple in nature and having helping hands
